recommendations.title: Cannonball

recommendations.title: Les Petits Princes
recommendations.overview: JB suffers from a heart malformation .He falsifies his medical file ,so that he can enter a top athlete training center.

recommendations.title: Public Friends
recommendations.overview: In order to make his little sick brother's dream come true, Leo and his best mates organize a fake score...but on the d day, they make a mistake and the fake score becomes a real hold up.Here starts the extraordinary adventure of PUBLIC Amis.

recommendations.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
recommendations.overview: Holly Golightly is an eccentric New York City playgirl determined to marry a Brazilian millionaire. But when young writer Paul Varjak moves into her apartment building, her past threatens to get in their way.

recommendations.title: Nappily Ever After
recommendations.overview: After an accident at the hair salon, Violet realizes she's not living life to the fullest. A soulful barber helps her put the pieces back together.

recommendations.title: Veinteañera, divorciada y fantástica
recommendations.overview: Regina, our young protagonist, always dreamed of getting married. And she did it - but the dream lasted much less than she thought and now she has to face life in a very funny way as a divorcee.

recommendations.title: Opening Night

recommendations.title: Limelight
recommendations.overview: A fading music hall comedian tries to help a despondent ballet dancer learn to walk and to again feel confident about life.
